message:
fix(core): restore runtime_compat::process::Command in cass, caut, wezterm

Commit d69d09b3 replaced runtime_compat::process::Command with
tokio::process::Command in these three modules, undoing the fix
from 8c4a7fa2. Under the asupersync runtime, tokio::process::Command
panics with "no reactor running" because it requires a Tokio runtime
context that asupersync does not provide.

Restore the runtime_compat wrapper which runs std::process::Command
on a blocking thread via spawn_blocking, avoiding the reactor
dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
